scene_title: Palma da mao com sinal carmesim luminoso
narrative_beat: Marca permanente com circuitos dourados emanando

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid human right palm held open with glowing crimson luminous mark engraved in hand surrounded by golden digital circuits emanating from mark with medieval biblical ornaments in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the glowing crimson mark engraved in the palm with golden digital circuits emanating
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern shopping center with grey people making payments in background

composition.foreground: palm and mark in vivid crimson gold

mood.emotion: Amazon Pay by Palm — the mark in the right hand operational

symbolism.primary: the right hand biometric as Revelation 13:16 already deployed
symbolism.secondary: medieval biblical ornaments surrounding modern technology — the commentary written in advance

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
